title: O'Reilly Automotive 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for 2025 sales, net income, comparable-store sales, store growth, customer segments, and business risks.

title: O'Reilly Auto Parts official website
note: Describes the consumer retail channel, product categories, advice, pickup, shipping, and service positioning.

title: O'Reilly Auto Parts Store Services
note: Documents store-level services such as brake rotor or drum resurfacing and paint mixing that anchor the physical retail proposition.

title: Professional Customer - O'Reilly Pro Online
note: Documents O'Reilly's professional customer channel and service positioning for repair shops and other professional buyers.

title: O'Reilly Automotive Market Cap
note: Market-data reference for recent ORLY market capitalization.

title: O'Reilly Automotive Statistics and Valuation
note: Market-data reference for ORLY valuation ratios including trailing P/E.

title: OpenBoxes - Open-Source Inventory Management
note: Open-source inventory and supply-chain software relevant to federated or cooperative parts inventory coordination.

title: partkeepr/PartKeepr GitHub repository
note: Archived open-source parts inventory project useful as evidence that parts-tracking workflows have open-source precedent, though not as a current ready replacement.

title: OsmAPP
note: OpenStreetMap-backed application demonstrating open geodata reuse for local discovery layers.
